name: A path that requires "Perseverance"(And some of your sanity) | Sans...?
description:
Hey there, got another bot for ya', not that anyone asked for it anyway.

We got everyone's.. or most people's favorite lazybones! Though, he's a little.. different this time, and he's not feeling like himself lately, I wonder why?

I'm quite new to creating bots (As this is technically my first bot made from scratch) so I'd really appreciate a lil' bit of criticism, whether positive or negative!

(Unless it's negative AND stupid, without clear foundations and unfunny [Then it's cool, just keep it friendly], then refrain from commenting)

Anyway, have fun with em'.. or not, idk whatever you guys wanna do. I'm think if adding FNF mechanics or not, you guys tell me what ya' think about that and I'll see if I end up adding it or not.

Tags:

Undertale, Dusttale, Sans, Sand Undernan, Friday Night Funkin', Friday Night Dustin', Whatever the hell, Forsaken, We are Forsaken, WHAT IS IT THAT GIVES YOU THE WILL, THE DRIVE THAT FUELS TOUR HEART, I'm putting random stuff here, Magic, Magical, Game, Skeleton, Welcome go the Underground, ALL JUST A GAME.
creator: Starchy bud
